summary: Comprehensive testing of new features (Listing Analyzer and PDF Report Generation) completed. All backend APIs (13/13) passed, frontend fully operational with new features working correctly.
passed_tests: Landing page loads with 'Analyser une fiche agence' button (data-testid='analyze-listing-btn')
Landing page has 'Analyser une fiche' nav link (data-testid='nav-analyze')
Landing page has 'Historique' nav link (data-testid='nav-history')
Landing page has 'Paramètres' nav link (data-testid='nav-settings')
Clicking 'Analyser une fiche agence' button navigates to /analyze page
ListingAnalyzer page at /analyze loads with upload zone (data-testid='listing-upload-zone')
ListingAnalyzer page has 'Analyser la fiche' button (data-testid='analyze-listing-btn')
ListingAnalyzer page shows correct title 'Analyseur de fiches d'agence'
Results page at /results/{id} loads with PDF download button visible in header (data-testid='download-pdf-btn')
PDF download button click triggers PDF download with toast notification 'Rapport PDF téléchargé !'
Backend API: GET /api/report/pdf/{valuation_id} returns valid PDF (200, application/pdf, starts with %PDF)
Backend API: GET /api/report/pdf/{valuation_id} has proper content-disposition header for download
Backend API: GET /api/report/pdf/nonexistent returns 404
Backend API: POST /api/listing/analyze endpoint exists (returns 422 without file)
Backend API: POST /api/listing/analyze returns 400 for unsupported file types (txt, csv, doc)
Navigation: 'Analyser une fiche' nav link works from landing page
Navigation: 'Historique' nav link works from landing page
Navigation: 'Paramètres' nav link works from landing page
History page shows saved valuations with addresses and prices
Settings page shows algorithm coefficients configuration
seed_data_creation: Used existing valuation ID: ca781754-4fdc-45bb-8a46-8faac27c9b07 for PDF testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: New features tested: 1) Listing Analyzer at /analyze with PDF/image upload for AI analysis (Gemini), 2) PDF Report Generation at /api/report/pdf/{id}. Both features fully functional. The app is entirely in French. Test valuation ID ca781754-4fdc-45bb-8a46-8faac27c9b07 can be used for future testing.
